parameters.subject: =File Attached to SubTask: {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}},

A file has been added to the subtask {{$json.subtask_title}}.

Attachment Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
File Name {{$json.file_name}}
File Type {{$json.file_type}}
Uploaded On {{$json.file_added_at}}
Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}
Parent Task {{$json.parent_task_title}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Task Link View Task Details

Please review the attached document as part of task execution.

Regards,
Document & Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  af.id                    AS attachment_id,
  ANY_VALUE(af.document_file_name)    AS file_name,
  ANY_VALUE(af.document_content_type) AS file_type,
  ANY_VALUE(af.created_at)            AS file_added_at,

  ANY_VALUE(t.id)          AS subtask_id,
  ANY_VALUE(t.title)       AS subtask_title,
  ANY_VALUE(t.created_at)  AS subtask_created_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.target_date) AS subtask_end_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.parent_id)   AS parent_task_id,

  ANY_VALUE(pt.title)      AS parent_task_title,

  ANY_VALUE(m.id)          AS milestone_id,
  ANY_VALUE(m.title)       AS milestone_title,

  ANY_VALUE(pm.id)         AS project_id,
  ANY_VALUE(pm.title)      AS project_title,

  ANY_VALUE(u.id)          AS task_owner_id,
  ANY_VALUE(u.email)       AS task_owner_email,
  ANY_VALUE(u.firstname)   AS task_owner_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(u.lastname)    AS task_owner_lastname,

  IFNULL(
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(obs.email, '||', obs.firstname, '||', obs.lastname)
    ),
    ''
  ) AS observers

FROM attachfiles af

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = af.relation_id
 AND af.relation = 'TaskManagement'

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = t.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
       m.project_management_id,
       pt.project_management_id
     )

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  af.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND af.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND u.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY af.id;
SELECT * FROM attachfiles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- =========================
  -- ATTACHMENT
  -- =========================
  af.id                    AS attachment_id,
  af.document_file_name    AS file_name,
  af.document_content_type AS file_type,
  af.created_at            AS file_added_at,

  -- =========================
  -- SUBTASK
  -- =========================
  t.id                     AS subtask_id,
  t.title                  AS subtask_title,
  t.created_at             AS subtask_created_on,
  t.target_date            AS subtask_end_on,
  t.parent_id              AS parent_task_id,

  -- =========================
  -- PARENT TASK
  -- =========================
  pt.title                 AS parent_task_title,

  -- =========================
  -- MILESTONE (via parent)
  -- =========================
  m.id                     AS milestone_id,
  m.title                  AS milestone_title,

  -- =========================
  -- PROJECT (via milestone OR parent)
  -- =========================
  pm.id                    AS project_id,
  pm.title                 AS project_title,

  -- =========================
  -- TASK OWNER
  -- =========================
  u.id                     AS task_owner_id,
  u.email                  AS task_owner_email,
  u.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  u.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname

FROM attachfiles af

-- Subtask
JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = af.relation_id
 AND af.relation = 'TaskManagement'

-- Task owner
JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- Parent task
LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = t.parent_id

-- Milestone via parent task
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

-- Project via milestone OR parent task (IMPORTANT FIX)
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
       m.project_management_id,
       pt.project_management_id
     )

WHERE
  af.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND af.active = 1
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL;  -- only subtasks

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
